title: 48-hour integration connections retain at 2.3x the 90-day rate
anchor: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration within 48 hours of kickoff.
connect: Accounts that integrated after the first week showed weaker 90-day retention across the same cohort.
body: 26 of 47 Q1 implementations connected their first integration within 48 hours of kickoff. Accounts that integrated after the first week showed weaker 90-day retention across the same cohort.
trace: Strong early-integration signal from Q1 cohort analysis showing retention multiplier effect.

title: Mid-market implementations cleared go-live 6 days ahead of plan
anchor: 22 Q1 implementations averaged Day 45 kickoff-to-go-live versus the Day 51 project plan baseline.
connect: Healthcare vertical ran at 38-day median across 11 go-lives this quarter.
body: 22 Q1 implementations averaged Day 45 kickoff-to-go-live versus the Day 51 project plan baseline. Healthcare vertical ran at 38-day median across 11 go-lives this quarter.
trace: Mid-market segment velocity improvement against baseline with healthcare leading.

title: Tier-2 activation crossed 14 days at 78% this quarter
anchor: Tier-2 complexity implementations reached first value inside 14 days, up from 54% in Q4.
connect: Tier-1 implementations hit 81% activation inside 14 days after the sandbox launched March 12.
body: Tier-2 complexity implementations reached first value inside 14 days, up from 54% in Q4. Tier-1 implementations hit 81% activation inside 14 days after the sandbox launched March 12.
trace: Tier-2 activation improvement with Tier-1 sandbox launch comparison.

title: 3-user activation by Day 30 shows 3.0x stronger 90-day retention
